mapper.select: select id, user_id, user_name, page_key, config_json, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from sys_user_column_config where user_id = #{userId} and page_key = #{pageKey} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into sys_user_column_config(user_id, user_name, page_key, config_json, create_by, create_time) values(#{userId}, #{userName}, #{pageKey}, #{configJson}, #{createBy}, sysdate())
mapper.update: update sys_user_column_config set user_name = #{userName}, config_json = #{configJson}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where id = #{id}
